annotations.text: Quick project status — wg status and wg viz
Launching the TUI with wg tui — Shift+I to shrink inspector
Chatting with the chat agent — "Build a haiku news pipeline"
The chat agent decomposes the request into 8 tasks with dependencies
Exploring live agent output — Detail, Log, and Firehose tabs
Adding new requirements mid-flight — "Add a roast mode"
Viewing the output — generated haiku from news headlines
Final graph survey and clean exit
